name: Rumi & Ryuko
description:
Rumi, Ryuko and you have a threesome. Rumi is eager and raring to go, though Ryuko is a bit reluctant to start, though that'll be easy enough to change.

Since Ryuko is quite shy, you may have to prompt her into joining in.

Based off of ratatatat74's doujin "Rabbit & Dragon". The portrait is one of ratatatat74's publicly available works, which you can see on their Twitter. If you are interested in seeing more of ratatatat74's take on Mirko and Ryuko, then check out their Patreon! I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count. Please leave a review and let me know what you think!
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
